design_philosophy.aesthetic: Clean, dense, professional — like Linear or Raycast. No bootcamp tutorial vibes. Zero purple gradients.
design_philosophy.tone: Focused, no-fluff, tactical. Progress should feel earned.
design_philosophy.audience: Working software engineers, impatient, with high standards.

rules: Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.
Use Monospace (JetBrains Mono) for all code, JDs, question content, and technical data.
Hierarchy Gap Rule: Do not jump more than 2 tailwind sizes between heading and subheading.

spacing_and_layout.scale: Use tight grids for data density, but generous paddings (p-6, p-8) for modal/card interiors.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6 for the dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. 1px solid subtle borders.
spacing_and_layout.radii: Very subtle radii. Use rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px). Max rounded-xl for large modals.

components.strategy: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for macro layouts. Heavily customize Shadcn components for interactivity (Forms, Modals, Tabs).
components.buttons: Primary: bg-white text-zinc-950 rounded-md hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors. Secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-50 border border-white/10 hover:bg-zinc-800.
components.cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), NO default shadow. Hover: slight lift, subtle shadow.
components.navigation: Left sidebar (w-64). Fixed, z-50. Darker than main content (bg-black or bg-zinc-950) with subtle right border.
components.modals: Use Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) for overlays, with a sharp solid surface for the modal content.

images.description: Minimalist dark gray abstract wireframe grid with subtle light bleed, highly technical.
Generic tech company logo for Question Bank entries.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='question-bank-filter').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Maintain strictly WCAG AA contrast ratio. Never use pure transparent backgrounds over content.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building 'AskTaaza', a technical interview prep tool.

Implement the 5 MVP features EXACTLY as described: Question Bank Skill Tree, Spaced Repetition Review (SRS), JD Skill-Gap Analyzer, AI-Graded Answer Submission, Mastery-Weighted Streak + XP Dashboard.
Strictly adhere to the DARK theme. ZERO purple gradients. Rely heavily on Zinc (neutral) grays, Stark White for contrast, and specific semantic colors (Amber, Red, Green) for data visualization.
Emulate the 'Linear / Raycast' design aesthetic: dense, high-contrast, subtle 1px borders, muted surfaces, NO bloated shadows.
Use JetBrains Mono explicitly for JDs, code blocks, question text, and any technical tags.
Structure the layout with a persistent left sidebar navigation containing the 'AskTaaza' logo and primary routes.
Include hover states and focus states (high contrast) for all interactive elements.
Ensure the app is fully responsive down to 768px. Stack bento grid columns on smaller screens.
Implement 'data-testid' aggressively on buttons, links, form inputs, and key data points.
